heading: State distribution of funds; matching requirement
label: 3302 State distribution of funds; matching requirement
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.text: shall use not less than 82.5 percent of the grant funds to award grants and contracts under and to carry out , of which not more than 20 percent of such amount shall be available to carry out ;section 3321 of this titlesection 3305 of this titlesection 3305 of this title
shall use not more than 12.5 percent of the grant funds to carry out State leadership activities under ; andsection 3303 of this title
shall use not more than 5 percent of the grant funds, or $85,000, whichever is greater, for the administrative expenses of the eligible agency.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of an eligible agency serving an outlying area, 12 percent of the total amount of funds expended for adult education and literacy activities in the outlying area, except that the Secretary may decrease the amount of funds required under this subparagraph for an eligible agency; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an eligible agency serving a State, 25 percent of the total amount of funds expended for adult education and literacy activities in the State.

children.heading: Non-Federal contribution
children.label: 2 Non-Federal contribution
children.text: An eligible agency’s non-Federal contribution required under paragraph (1) may be provided in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, and shall include only non-Federal funds that are used for adult education and literacy activities in a manner that is consistent with the purpose of this subchapter.
